info.name: CodeValdAgency
info.description:
Agency lifecycle management operations proxied by CodeValdCross to CodeValdAgency's AgencyService gRPC.

There is exactly one agency per database — no agency ID appears in any URL.

Base URL defaults to http://localhost:8080. Override the `baseUrl` variable to point at any running instance.

variable.description: Base URL of the CodeValdCross HTTP management server.

item.name: codevaldagency
item.description:
Agency lifecycle management operations proxied by CodeValdCross to CodeValdAgency's AgencyService gRPC.

There is exactly one agency per database — no agency ID is needed in the URL.

Routes declared by CodeValdAgency registrar:
- `POST /agency` — create or replace the full agency document
- `GET /agency` — retrieve the single agency
- `PUT /agency` — apply incremental field edits with lifecycle validation

**Note on `POST /agency` body**: The gRPC `SetAgencyDetails` RPC accepts a `json` field that is the entire agency document serialised as a JSON string.

body.raw: {"json": "{\"name\":\"Agency Creator\",\"mission\":\"To guide human domain experts through a structured design process that produces coherent, validated Agency artifacts — in both JSON and Markdown format — ready for deployment on the CodeVald platform.\",\"vision\":\"Every agency created on the CodeVald platform is coherently designed, consistently structured, and traceable from mission to work item — eliminating ambiguity and accelerating delivery from day one.\",\"status\":\"draft\",\"goals\":[{\"title\":\"Elicit Domain Knowledge\",\"description\":\"Capture coherent requirements from human domain experts through structured Q&A to fully define the agency's purpose, roles, and workflows.\",\"ordinality\":1},{\"title\":\"Design Coherent Agency Structure\",\"description\":\"Translate elicited requirements into a logically consistent agency design — with aligned Goals, Workflows, Work Items, and RACI assignments.\",\"ordinality\":2},{\"title\":\"Produce Validated JSON Artifact\",\"description\":\"Generate a structurally correct agency.json that passes all data model rules before being written to disk.\",\"ordinality\":3},{\"title\":\"Produce Markdown Documentation\",\"description\":\"Generate a human-readable Markdown document alongside the JSON, describing the agency's design for traceability and review.\",\"ordinality\":4}],\"workflows\":[{\"name\":\"Domain Elicitation\",\"work_items\":[{\"title\":\"Initiate Session\",\"description\":\"Open the design session; capture the agency's one-sentence purpose and confirm the agency name.\",\"order\":1,\"parallel\":false,\"goal_ids\":[\"Elicit Domain Knowledge\"],\"assignments\":[{\"role\":\"agency_designer\",\"raci\":\"R\"},{\"role\":\"admin\",\"raci\":\"A\"},{\"role\":\"domain_expert\",\"raci\":\"C\"}]},{\"title\":\"Refine Mission & Vision\",\"description\":\"Using the stated purpose as a seed, propose a draft Mission and Vision for the domain expert to confirm, refine, or reject.\",\"order\":2,\"parallel\":false,\"goal_ids\":[\"Elicit Domain Knowledge\",\"Design Coherent Agency Structure\"],\"assignments\":[{\"role\":\"agency_designer\",\"raci\":\"R\"},{\"role\":\"admin\",\"raci\":\"A\"},{\"role\":\"domain_expert\",\"raci\":\"C\"}]},{\"title\":\"Elicit Goals & Ordinality\",\"description\":\"Identify all strategic Goals and assign priority order through structured Q&A.\",\"order\":3,\"parallel\":false,\"goal_ids\":[\"Elicit Domain Knowledge\",\"Design Coherent Agency Structure\"],\"assignments\":[{\"role\":\"agency_designer\",\"raci\":\"R\"},{\"role\":\"admin\",\"raci\":\"A\"},{\"role\":\"domain_expert\",\"raci\":\"C\"}]},{\"title\":\"Elicit Roles & Actor Types\",\"description\":\"Define all custom roles beyond admin/super_admin, and specify the actor_type (human, ai, or either) for each.\",\"order\":4,\"parallel\":false,\"goal_ids\":[\"Elicit Domain Knowledge\",\"Design Coherent Agency Structure\"],\"assignments\":[{\"role\":\"agency_designer\",\"raci\":\"R\"},{\"role\":\"admin\",\"raci\":\"A\"},{\"role\":\"domain_expert\",\"raci\":\"C\"}]},{\"title\":\"Elicit Workflows & Work Items\",\"description\":\"Define all Workflows, Work Items, execution order, parallelism, goal references, and RACI assignments.\",\"order\":5,\"parallel\":false,\"goal_ids\":[\"Elicit Domain Knowledge\",\"Design Coherent Agency Structure\"],\"assignments\":[{\"role\":\"agency_designer\",\"raci\":\"R\"},{\"role\":\"admin\",\"raci\":\"A\"},{\"role\":\"domain_expert\",\"raci\":\"C\"}]},{\"title\":\"Validate Design Completeness\",\"description\":\"Verify all stop conditions are cleared — every work item has assignments, all goal_ids resolve to valid Goals, and ordinality values are unique.\",\"order\":6,\"parallel\":false,\"goal_ids\":[\"Elicit Domain Knowledge\",\"Design Coherent Agency Structure\"],\"assignments\":[{\"role\":\"agency_designer\",\"raci\":\"R\"},{\"role\":\"admin\",\"raci\":\"A\"},{\"role\":\"domain_expert\",\"raci\":\"C\"}]}]},{\"name\":\"Artifact Production\",\"work_items\":[{\"title\":\"Generate agency.json\",\"description\":\"Produce the validated agency.json file matching the data model exactly, with status set to draft.\",\"order\":1,\"parallel\":true,\"goal_ids\":[\"Produce Validated JSON Artifact\"],\"assignments\":[{\"role\":\"agency_designer\",\"raci\":\"R\"},{\"role\":\"admin\",\"raci\":\"A\"},{\"role\":\"agency_reviewer\",\"raci\":\"C\"},{\"role\":\"domain_expert\",\"raci\":\"I\"}]},{\"title\":\"Generate Markdown Documentation\",\"description\":\"Produce the human-readable Markdown companion document describing the agency's mission, vision, goals, roles, workflows, and work items.\",\"order\":1,\"parallel\":true,\"goal_ids\":[\"Produce Markdown Documentation\"],\"assignments\":[{\"role\":\"agency_designer\",\"raci\":\"R\"},{\"role\":\"admin\",\"raci\":\"A\"},{\"role\":\"agency_reviewer\",\"raci\":\"C\"},{\"role\":\"domain_expert\",\"raci\":\"I\"}]},{\"title\":\"Review & Sign-off\",\"description\":\"Reviewer checks both artifacts for correctness, coherence, and full data model compliance before the agency is persisted.\",\"order\":2,\"parallel\":false,\"goal_ids\":[\"Produce Validated JSON Artifact\",\"Produce Markdown Documentation\"],\"assignments\":[{\"role\":\"agency_reviewer\",\"raci\":\"R\"},{\"role\":\"admin\",\"raci\":\"A\"},{\"role\":\"domain_expert\",\"raci\":\"I\"}]}]}],\"configured_roles\":[{\"role\":\"domain_expert\",\"actor_type\":\"human\"},{\"role\":\"agency_designer\",\"actor_type\":\"ai\"},{\"role\":\"agency_reviewer\",\"actor_type\":\"either\"}],\"created_at\":\"\",\"updated_at\":\"\"}"}

request.description:
Creates or fully replaces the agency document by forwarding to CodeValdAgency's `SetAgencyDetails` gRPC RPC.

The `json` field must contain the complete agency document serialised as a compact JSON string. The body is pre-populated with the full contents of `Agencies/AG_AgencyCreator/agency.json`.

**Responses**
| Status | `code` | Meaning |
|--------|--------|---------|
| 200 | — | Agency created/replaced; full agency object returned |
| 400 | `INVALID_ARGUMENT` | `agency id must not be empty` |
| 503 | `SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE` | CodeValdAgency has not yet registered with CodeValdCross |

response.name: Agency created / replaced

request.description:
Retrieves the single agency for this database by forwarding to CodeValdAgency's `GetAgency` gRPC RPC. No parameters required — there is exactly one agency per database.

**Responses**
| Status | `code` | Meaning |
|--------|--------|---------|
| 200 | — | Agency returned |
| 404 | `NOT_FOUND` | No agency document exists yet — call `POST /agency` first |
| 503 | `SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE` | CodeValdAgency has not yet registered with CodeValdCross |

response.name: Agency found

request.description:
Applies incremental field edits to the single agency with lifecycle validation, forwarding to CodeValdAgency's `UpdateAgency` gRPC RPC. Only fields present in the body are changed — omitted fields are left unchanged.

**Lifecycle transitions** (strictly forward-only):
- `draft` → `active`
- `active` → `achieved`
- `achieved` → (terminal)

**Responses**
| Status | `code` | Meaning |
|--------|--------|---------|
| 200 | — | Agency updated; full updated agency object returned |
| 404 | `NOT_FOUND` | No agency document exists yet |
| 422 | `FAILED_PRECONDITION` | Invalid lifecycle transition (e.g. `active` → `draft`) |
| 503 | `SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE` | CodeValdAgency has not yet registered with CodeValdCross |

response.name: Agency updated
